settings.title: Settings
settings.loadErrorHint: Check that the API is running and try again.

personalization.name: Personalization
personalization.description: Customize the behavior and tone of the model.

models.name: Models
models.description: Connect to AI services and manage connections.

memory.name: Memory
memory.description: The strategist's internal briefing on how to serve you better — you may correct it.

memory.hint: Internal strategist notes: who you are, blind spots, and how to adjust help — not a letter to you. Correct anytime.
memory.placeholder: Service strategy, blind spots, leverage points, tone cues…

preferences.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the interface.

theme.name: Theme
theme.description: Choose between light and dark layouts for the app.

measureUnit.name: Measurement Unit
measureUnit.description: Choose between Metric and Imperial measurement unit.

autoMediaSearch.name: Auto video & image search
autoMediaSearch.description: Automatically search for relevant images and videos.

showWeatherWidget.name: Show weather widget
showWeatherWidget.description: Display the weather card on the home screen.

enableTts.name: Text-to-speech (browser)
enableTts.description: Show the read-aloud button on assistant messages (browser speech synthesis).

enableRelatedSuggestions.name: Related follow-up suggestions
enableRelatedSuggestions.description: After an answer, automatically generate follow-up questions (uses an extra model call).

systemInstructions.name: System Instructions
systemInstructions.description: Add custom behavior or tone for the model.
systemInstructions.placeholder: e.g., "Respond in a friendly and concise tone" or "Use British English and format answers as bullet points."

vane_custom_prompts.name: Quick Prompts
vane_custom_prompts.description: Edit reusable prompts below. In the input: type / to filter by command; press Ctrl+/ (Cmd+/ on macOS) to open the full palette.

searxngURL.name: SearXNG URL
searxngURL.description: The URL of your SearXNG instance

models.noConnectionsDescription: Add your first connection to start using AI models. Connect to OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, and more.
models.deleteConnectionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the connection "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone. All associated models will also be removed.

quickPrompts.usageHint: In the input: / filters commands · Ctrl+/ (Mac: Cmd+/) opens the palette · drag blocks to reorder
quickPrompts.title: Title
quickPrompts.saveShortcut: Ctrl+Enter to save · Esc to cancel

usage.noUsageInRange: No usage recorded in this range.

advisor.subtitle: Your strategist reads recent chats and writes a long-form advisory report. Open any report to correct or refine his impression of you.
advisor.runFailed: Advisor run failed. Please try again.
advisor.empty: No advisor reports yet. Click "Run advisor now" when eligible, then follow up inside each report.
advisor.followUpHint: Reply to correct or add to what the advisor believes about you.
advisor.followUpPlaceholder: Discuss with your strategist — correct or refine his impression of you…

eligibility.firstRun: First run: click "Run advisor now" to start.
eligibility.dueDays: {{days}} days since last run, {{messages}} new user messages (time threshold met).
eligibility.dueMessages: {{days}} days since last run, {{messages}} new user messages (message threshold met).
eligibility.notDue: {{days}} days since last run, {{messages}} new user messages (needs 28 days or 30 new messages).
eligibility.notDueShort: Not eligible for an advisor run yet.

modal.title: New writing task
modal.sourceHint: The draft is based on this chat's Q&A — no separate seed text needed.
modal.instructionPlaceholder: Tell the team what to write, which angle to take, and what to emphasize…
modal.configRequired: Configure chat and embedding models in Settings first.
modal.sourceChatRequired: Open Writing team from inside a chat (source conversation required).

list.subtitle: Long-form drafts from the writing team.
list.empty: No drafts yet. Open a chat and click Writing team to start.

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Past chats, sources, and uploads.
library.empty: No chats found in this space.
library.deleteSpaceConfirm: Delete this space? Chats in it will stay in Library (uncategorized).

chat.serverError: Failed to connect to the server. Please try again later.
chat.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?

messageInput.askFollowUp: Ask a follow-up… (Ctrl+/ for Quick Prompts)
messageInput.askAnything: Ask Shiye anything… (Ctrl+/ for Quick Prompts)

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: Prioritize speed and get the quickest possible answer.

balanced.title: Balanced
balanced.description: Find the right balance between speed and accuracy

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Thorough answers with source verification — depth over speed
